name: PER_ASSIGN_WORK_MEASURES_F_
description:
This table holds information about the HR budget values for an assignment. An Assignment may be budgeted using headcount, FTE (full time equivalent), points or any other user defined units. Oracle HRMS sums the budget values held in this table for employee assignment when calculating actual headcount figures.

This table has been renamed for Fusion. It was formerly known as PER_ASSIGNMENT_BUDGET_VALUES_F.

columns.Name: ASSIGN_WORK_MEASURE_ID
columns.Comments: System-generated primary key column.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M.

columns.Name: UNIT
columns.Comments: Budget measurement units, for example, headcount, FTE, points.

columns.Name: VALUE
columns.Comments: Budget measurement value..

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: LEGISTAION_CODE

columns.Name: ADDS_TO_BUDGET
columns.Comments: Determines whether actual assignment is considered as part of the total budget.

columns.Name: FREEZE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the Deferred data freeze start date (defaulted to End of Time).

columns.Name: FREEZE_UNTIL_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the Deferred data freeze until date (defaulted to Start of time).

columns.Name: CALCULATE_WORKMEASURE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Capture the flag whether to re calculate the FTE Head Count value

columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.
